summary: Completed testing of SoulNutri Admin Panel features. Backend: 11/14 tests passed (79%). Frontend: All critical features working - thumbnails, edit modal, move dropdown, delete confirmation, inline notifications.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 404 when source image doesn't exist - move appears to succeed silently
Count mismatch - returns 25 images but count=24 for arroz-branco
Returns 200 instead of 404 for non-existent image

action_items: MINOR: Fix move-image endpoint to return 404 when source image doesn't exist
MINOR: Fix dish-images-list count to match actual images array length
MINOR: Fix delete endpoint to return 404 for non-existent images
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Thumbnails working correctly - thumb=1 parameter compresses images from ~3MB to ~15KB
✓ Move button uses SELECT dropdown (not text input) - prevents user errors
✓ Two-click delete confirmation working - shows 'DELETAR?' on first click
✓ Inline notification system working - no alert()/confirm() calls that freeze iframe
✓ Edit modal shows dish name, description, ingredients fields correctly
✓ Gallery images load with thumbnails (39 images loaded quickly)
✓ 206 dishes displayed with ingredientes field populated (192 with ingredients, 14 without - expected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel features all working. Minor backend issues with error handling for non-existent images (returns 200 instead of 404). All UI features verified: thumbnails, edit modal, move dropdown, delete confirmation, inline notifications.

admin_page_load.details: 206 dishes displayed with thumbnails loading fast

thumbnails.details: thumb=1 parameter compresses images significantly (e.g., 135KB full -> ~15KB thumb)

edit_modal.details: Opens correctly, shows dish name, description, ingredients, gallery with thumbnails

move_image_dropdown.details: Uses SELECT dropdown with all dishes listed (not text input)

delete_two_click.details: First click shows 'DELETAR?', second click deletes

notification_system.details: Inline notifications appear (e.g., '✅ Prato salvo!') - no alert() calls
